seo.title: Conway Live Music & Arts Festival 2026 | Metro Little Rock Events
seo.description: Conway's summer music and arts festival takes over downtown Conway with multiple stages, local food vendors, and family-friendly activities.

description: The Conway Live Music & Arts Festival transforms downtown Conway's Front Street and courthouse square into a two-day music destination with four stages, 30+ performers, local food vendors, and artisan market tents. The festival leans heavily into the college-town energy that Hendrix College and UCA bring to Conway — expect an eclectic lineup that runs from Americana and country to funk, soul, and indie rock. Saturday is the main event; Sunday adds family programming and afternoon acoustic sets. Conway's growing restaurant scene handles the dinner crowd in the gaps between sets.
